title: triticum sativum subproles compactum
intro: Triticum sativum subproles compactum, also known as compact wheat, is a subspecies of wheat that is a compact or dwarf variety of the common wheat plant. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Compact wheat has been shown to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and aiding in the treatment of diabetes. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water.
